scripts.visual_hook: Frame 1: girl mid-ugly-cry holding a hoodie, mascara running, caption frozen over her face
scripts.text_hook: I put our dog's heartbeat on a hoodie and she hasn't stopped crying

script.voiceover: I put our dog's last heartbeat on a hoodie and my sister hasn't stopped crying.
script.visual: Ugly-cry reaction shot, hoodie clutched to chest

script.voiceover: I almost bought her another personalised mug. You know the ones — same script font, same clipart paw print.
script.visual: Scroll through generic Etsy mug listings, eye-roll

script.voiceover: She'd have said thanks, put it in the cupboard, and never thought about it again. For the dog she had for 14 years.
script.visual: Mug shoved to back of cupboard, door closes

script.voiceover: Then I found this shop where an actual human redraws your design stitch by stitch. I sent them the vet's printout of Biscuit's heartbeat.
script.visual: Screen recording: uploading ECG strip, digitiser's stitch-map preview

script.voiceover: Because it's hand-digitised, every tiny spike of that heartbeat is sharp. It reads like the real printout — you can tell it wasn't mass-produced.
script.visual: Macro shot of stitching next to the original ECG paper

script.voiceover: The print-on-demand version I almost ordered? I've seen them after one wash. Blurry threads, cracked vinyl.
script.visual: Side-by-side: faded auto-digitised patch vs crisp hand-digitised one

script.voiceover: She wears it every single day. She told me it's the best gift she's ever gotten. I believe her — I cried when I opened mine.
script.visual: Sister wearing hoodie on a walk, smiling, touching the embroidery

script.voiceover: They do heartbeats, handwriting, kids' drawings — anything. Link in bio, takes like 2 minutes to upload.
script.visual: Quick montage of 3 other custom pieces, link sticker

scripts.visual_hook: Company logo animation with sparkle effect
scripts.text_hook: Custom Embroidery Co — Quality You Can Trust

script.voiceover: At Custom Embroidery Co, we have been providing premium embroidery solutions since 2018.
We offer custom embroidered hats, hoodies, jackets and more, with industry-leading stitch density and a wide range of thread colors.
Our state-of-the-art machines and rigorous quality control process ensure excellence in every order.
Order today and enjoy 10% off your first purchase. Satisfaction guaranteed.
Visit our website now. Custom Embroidery Co — Quality You Can Trust.
